A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent had an overall correct approach but implemented the filtering incorrectly—first querying a nonexistent CANCER_TYPE_ACRONYM column (call_B7QafXYVRtDMx2JpMeYTF0N7) and then using an over-specific ILIKE pattern on Patient_description that returned empty results (call_jMEaDlknh5tFEY2Lp0PQjzh4, call_FTLK0edb41Hlu3DyeJf0jPka) despite the sample row (call_d1n7kcd4TSznNhN397M9z9QI) revealing a different wording, leading it to prematurely declare the task impossible.

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s final answer is wrong because, using the contributing calls (query_db to fetch CDH1 mutations and clinical breast records, then execute_python), it implemented brittle, case-sensitive regex parsing of barcodes and vital status from Patient_description and aggregated mutations by summing row-level booleans instead of unique patients, yielding severely undercounted totals and distorted mutation percentages.
